message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the west and should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 15:45 on monday
If the booking fails how about 14:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 16:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should go to london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
